initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['review']
Prompt family: review
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Write a tentative answer and ask one reviewer child to identify specific missing technical details (e.g., exact mathematical formulas, specific data structure implementations, or precise algorithmic update rules) in the current draft. The reviewer must provide a list of these gaps. The goal is to prepare the draft for a final version that is a complete, implementable technical specification rather than a high-level strategy.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "draft_response": "plain-text draft answer",
  "message_for_reviewer": "plain-text review request for the child"
}
Additional instruction prompt profiles: []
System prompt:


User prompt:
Write a tentative answer and ask one reviewer child to identify specific missing technical details (e.g., exact mathematical formulas, specific data structure implementations, or precise algorithmic update rules) in the current draft. The reviewer must provide a list of these gaps. The goal is to prepare the draft for a final version that is a complete, implementable technical specification rather than a high-level strategy.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "review",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "draft_response": "plain-text draft answer",
  "message_for_reviewer": "plain-text review request for the child"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S4-ahc030-polyomino-mining
Title: S4. AHC030 / Polyomino Mining

Problem:
Given known polyomino oil-field shapes but unknown placements, recover all oil-containing cells with as little probing cost as possible using drilling, noisy aggregate queries, and final guesses.

Grading target:
Lower probing cost is better.
Contest score is derived from absolute and relative cost.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
final_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 2
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: review
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
A review child has already returned critique or an improved draft. Use that returned work to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}

A review child has already returned critique or an improved draft. Use that returned work to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}

Child results already returned to you:
[
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_01",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: 1) Bayesian update: P(S|Q) proportional to P(Q|S)P(S) with Gaussian noise; 2) Data structures: Bitmasks for templates, 2D arrays for grids; 3) Cross-correlation: Sum of products between query results and template masks; 4) Threshold: Posterior probability exceeding a predefined value.\nJUSTIFICATION: Added specific formulas, data structures, algorithms, and threshold definitions."
  }
]
